methods.Map asMap(): Returns a view of this multimap as a Map from each distinct key to the nonempty collection of that key's associated values.
methods.void clear(): Removes all key-value pairs from the multimap, leaving it empty.
methods.boolean containsEntry(Object key, Object: Returns true if this multimap contains at least one key-value pair with the key key and the value value.
methods.boolean containsKey(Object key): Returns true if this multimap contains at least one key-value pair with the key key.
methods.boolean containsValue(Object value): Returns true if this multimap contains at least one key-value pair with the value value.
methods.HashMultimap create(): Creates a new, empty HashMultimap with the default initial capacities.
methods.HashMultimap create(int expectedKeys, in: Constructs an empty HashMultimap with enough capacity to hold the specified numbers of keys and values without rehashing.
methods.HashMultimap create(Multimap multimap): Constructs a HashMultimap with the same mappings as the specified multimap.
methods.Set entries(): Returns a view collection of all key-value pairs contained in this multimap, as Map.Entry instances.
methods.boolean equals(Object object): Compares the specified object to this multimap for equality.
methods.Set get(K key): Returns a view collection of the values associated with key in this multimap, if any.
methods.int hashCode(): Returns the hash code for this multimap.
methods.boolean isEmpty(): Returns true if this multimap contains no key-value pairs.
methods.Multiset keys(): Returns a view collection containing the key from each key-value pair in this multimap, without collapsing duplicates.
methods.Set keySet(): Returns a view collection of all distinct keys contained in this multimap.
methods.boolean put(K key, V value): Stores a key-value pair in the multimap.
methods.boolean putAll(K key, Iterable values): Stores a key-value pair in this multimap for each of values, all using the same key, key.
methods.boolean putAll(Multimap multimap): Stores all key-value pairs of multimap in this multimap, in the order returned by multimap.entries().
methods.boolean remove(Object key, Object value): Removes a single key-value pair with the key key and the value value from this multimap, if such exists.
methods.Set removeAll(Object key): Removes all values associated with the key key.
methods.Set replaceValues(K key, Iterable values: Stores a collection of values with the same key, replacing any existing values for that key.
methods.int size(): Returns the number of key-value pairs in this multimap.
methods.String toString(): Returns a string representation of the multimap, generated by calling toString on the map returned by Multimap.asMap().
methods.Collection values(): Returns a view collection containing the value from each key-value pair contained in this multimap, without collapsing duplicates (so values().size() == size()).
